## Use Case

What are you trying to do with Obsidian and Dify?

## Proposed Improvement

Describe the feature or workflow improvement.

## Why It Matters

Explain how this would make the plugin easier, safer, or more useful.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any workaround you are using today.
